subcodes.first_line: O ye survivors of the martyrs! The denizens of the Supreme Concourse yearn for this supreme martyrdom, and so too do the dwellers in the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بقایاء الشهداء اهل ملاء اعلی آرزوی این شهادت کبری نمایند و اهل ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
